heading: Delete an Online Archive Through the Atlas CLI
body:
To delete an online archive for a cluster using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas clusters onlineArchives delete <archiveId> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas clusters onlineArchives delete](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-clusters-onlineArchives-delete).
